title: Verify T27 decompose config disabled test
description: Test T27 verifies that decompose.enabled: false in kody.config.json causes immediate fallback to normal pipeline. The test was already executed and cleaned up (commits e0b8341/69b1c6f). Implementation found in node_modules/.pnpm/@kody-ade+engine@0.1.0/node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js:8589-8592 which logs 'decompose disabled in config — falling back to normal pipeline' and calls fallbackToPipeline() when config.decompose?.enabled === false.

existing_patterns.pattern: config.decompose?.enabled === false check with immediate fallbackToPipeline()
T27 test specification with setup/verification/cleanup steps
